Careers

At SMATS Traffic Solutions, we’re shaping the future of intelligent transportation through innovation, collaboration, and a passion for smarter mobility. Joining our team means working with cutting-edge traffic analytics technologies that help cities, agencies, and organizations improve safety, efficiency, and sustainability on our roads. We foster a supportive and inclusive environment where your ideas matter, your skills grow, and your work makes a real-world impact.

Whether you’re an engineer, data analyst, developer, or business professional, you’ll be part of a team that’s dedicated to solving today’s transportation challenges and building a smarter, connected future.

We do not have any job openings.

Reach out today

The first step towards a better traffic management solution!
